acknowledged_affected_count.description: The affected-user count from workflows-blast-radius that you showed the user AND they explicitly confirmed before scheduling. Each firing re-broadcasts to the audience at that time; rejected if it no longer matches.

rrule.description: iCalendar RRULE (e.g. 'FREQ=DAILY;INTERVAL=1'). Must produce occurrences at most once per hour.

starts_at.description: ISO 8601 datetime the schedule starts from.

variables.description: Optional {key: value} variable overrides merged with the workflow defaults on each run.

workflow_id.description: ID of the batch workflow to attach the recurring schedule to.
